title: MCUQuickStart
sdk_root_tip: All chip SDK packages should be placed under this directory.
err_sdk_root: Please set the SDK root directory.
help_text:
MCUQuickStart Usage

  1. Set SDK Root: Place all chip firmware packages (STM32/GD32) and optional libraries (FreeRTOS) in one directory. The tool auto-matches them.
  2. Select Chip: Choose the family first, then the specific model.
  3. Project Name & Output: The project will be created in a subfolder under the output directory.
  4. Choose Template: Empty (main loop only), LED Blink, or UART Printf.
  5. Optional Libs: Check FreeRTOS to generate an RTOS-enabled project.
  6. Generate: Open the generated .uvprojx in Keil MDK, compile and run.
